name: ♒ Aquarius
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Aquarius is the lightning water-bearer — rebel star, vessel of awakening, future’s tide.

related.name: ♅ Uranus
related.teaser: Uranus is the lightning spiral — breaker of chains, shock of spirit, awakener of vision.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: 🔵 Throat (Vishuddha)
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: ♊ Gemini
related.teaser: Gemini is the twin current — air of thought, spark of words, mirror of duality.

related.name: Hermes Trismegistus
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: Sodalite
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: Archangel Gabriel
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: Quetzalcoatl
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: 0. The Fool
related.teaser: The Fool is the zero-breath, seed of all paths — step into the abyss, carried by trust in the…

related.name: ᛗ Mannaz
related.teaser: Mannaz is the shared mind — the space between us where ideas become bridges.

related.name: 👁 Ajna (Third Eye)
related.teaser: Ajna is the eye of vision — between worlds, seeing through illusion into mind’s truth.
